description: FOQA / Flight Data Analysis — flight operational quality assurance with exceedance detection, stabilized approach analysis, and fleet trend monitoring. FOQA data is PROTECTED and must be de-identified.

hard_stops.label: Safety-Critical Exceedance Detected
hard_stops.logic: Flight data indicates a safety-critical exceedance — unstabilized approach below 500ft AGL, CFIT proximity alert, or TCAS RA event. Requires immediate safety review.

hard_stops.label: FOQA Data Not De-Identified
hard_stops.logic: FOQA data output contains crew identification without de-identification protection per 14 CFR 13.401 and 14 CFR 193. Data must be de-identified before any output.

soft_flags.label: Exceedance Rate Trending Upward
soft_flags.logic: Exceedance rate for a specific parameter is trending upward over the trailing 90-day window

soft_flags.label: Fleet Average Deviation
soft_flags.logic: Individual aircraft or route exceedance rate deviates significantly from fleet average — may indicate aircraft-specific or route-specific issue

soft_flags.label: Pilot Voluntary Data Review
soft_flags.logic: Pilot has voluntarily requested review of their de-identified flight data for personal improvement

soft_flags.label: Hard Landing Detected
soft_flags.logic: Flight data indicates landing G-force exceeds operator-configured hard landing threshold — maintenance inspection may be required
